history.en: This is a smart and intelligent cat which bonds well with humans. With its affectionate and playful personality the Angora is a top choice for families. The Angora gets along great with other pets in the home, but it will make clear who is in charge, and who the house belongs to
history.zh: 这是一种聪明且智慧的猫，能与人类建立良好关系。凭借其深情和爱玩的性格，安哥拉猫是家庭的首选。它们能与其他宠物和睦相处，但会明确谁才是主人，房子属于谁。

overview.en: The Turkish Angora is a naturally elegant, medium-sized cat with a silky, flowing coat and a slender, athletic build. Known for its affectionate and playful nature, this breed forms strong bonds with its human family and thrives on companionship. Highly intelligent and clever, the Angora is curious and loves interactive play. Despite its gentle demeanor, it has a confident, sometimes assertive personality and will often take charge of the household. Agile and social, it gets along well with children and other pets, but appreciates being the center of attention. This breed is vocal and communicative, often using a soft meow to express its needs. Overall, the Turkish Angora is a loving, lively, and loyal companion that brings joy and energy to any home.
overview.zh: 土耳其安哥拉猫是一种天生优雅的中型猫，拥有丝滑飘逸的毛发和修长健美的体型。以其深情和顽皮的性格而闻名，该品种与人类家庭建立牢固的联系，并渴望陪伴。非常聪明且机智，安哥拉猫充满好奇心，喜爱互动游戏。尽管性情温和，但它自信且有时强势，常常掌控家庭局面。敏捷且善于社交，它能与孩子和其他宠物相处融洽，但更喜欢成为关注的焦点。该品种善于发声和交流，常用轻柔的喵叫声表达需求。总之，土耳其安哥拉猫是充满爱心、活泼且忠诚的伴侣，为任何家庭带来欢乐和活力。

care.en: Daily care for a Turkish Angora includes brushing its single-layer coat 2-3 times per week to prevent tangles and reduce shedding; during seasonal shedding, daily brushing is recommended. Bathe only when necessary, using a gentle cat shampoo. Provide a balanced diet with high-quality protein, and ensure fresh water is always available. Exercise is crucial: engage in at least 30 minutes of interactive play daily with toys like wand teasers, laser pointers, or puzzle feeders. Trim nails every 2-3 weeks, clean ears weekly, and brush teeth regularly. Schedule annual veterinary check-ups, keep vaccinations up to date, and consider dental cleanings as advised. Spay or neuter unless breeding. Monitor for common health issues like hypertrophic cardiomyopathy (HCM) and deafness in white-coated individuals.
care.zh: 土耳其安哥拉猫的日常护理包括每周梳理单层被毛2-3次，防止打结并减少掉毛；换毛季节建议每日梳理。仅在必要时洗澡，使用温和的猫咪专用香波。提供均衡饮食，富含优质蛋白质，并确保随时有新鲜饮水。运动至关重要：每天至少进行30分钟互动游戏，使用逗猫棒、激光笔或益智喂食器等玩具。每2-3周修剪指甲，每周清洁耳朵，定期刷牙。每年安排兽医体检，保持疫苗接种最新，并根据建议进行牙齿清洁。除非繁殖，否则建议绝育。注意常见健康问题，如肥厚性心肌病（HCM）和白色个体的耳聋。

training.en: The Turkish Angora is highly intelligent and responds well to positive reinforcement training. Use treats, praise, and clicker training to teach tricks, commands, or walking on a leash. Keep sessions short (5-10 minutes) and fun to maintain interest. This breed can be stubborn; patience and consistency are key. Provide puzzle toys and interactive games to challenge its mind. Litter box training is usually easy; keep the box clean and in a quiet location. Socialize early with people, other pets, and new environments to build confidence. Avoid punishment, as it can cause fear or aggression. With its clever nature, the Angora can learn to open doors or cabinets, so consider childproof locks if needed.
training.zh: 土耳其安哥拉猫非常聪明，对正面强化训练反应良好。使用零食、表扬和响片训练来教它技巧、指令或牵绳散步。保持训练时间短（5-10分钟）且有趣，以维持兴趣。该品种可能固执，耐心和一致性是关键。提供益智玩具和互动游戏来挑战其智力。猫砂盆训练通常容易；保持砂盆清洁并放在安静位置。早期进行社会化，接触人、其他宠物和新环境以建立信心。避免惩罚，否则可能引起恐惧或攻击性。由于天性聪明，安哥拉猫可能会学会开门或开柜，因此必要时考虑使用儿童安全锁。

diet.en: Feed a high-quality diet rich in animal protein, such as chicken, turkey, or fish, as the first ingredient. A mix of wet and dry food helps maintain hydration and dental health. Portion control is important to prevent obesity; follow feeding guidelines on the food package adjusted for age, weight, and activity level. Adult Turkish Angoras typically need 2-3 small meals per day. Avoid overfeeding treats; use them sparingly for training. Provide fresh water daily, and consider a cat water fountain to encourage drinking. Consult your veterinarian for specific dietary needs, especially if your cat has sensitivities or health conditions. Avoid foods with artificial additives, fillers, or excessive carbohydrates.
diet.zh: 喂食以动物蛋白（如鸡肉、火鸡肉或鱼肉）为首要成分的高品质猫粮。湿粮和干粮混合喂养有助于保持水分和牙齿健康。控制食量以防肥胖；根据年龄、体重和活动水平调整包装上的喂食指南。成年土耳其安哥拉猫通常每天需要2-3顿小餐。避免过量喂食零食；仅在训练时少量使用。每日提供新鲜饮水，可考虑使用猫饮水机以鼓励饮水。咨询兽医了解特定饮食需求，特别是如果您的猫有敏感或健康问题。避免含人工添加剂、填充物或过多碳水化合物的食物。

livingTips.en: The Turkish Angora adapts well to apartment living if provided with vertical spaces like cat trees, shelves, and window perches for climbing and observation. It enjoys interactive play and needs daily exercise to prevent boredom. A secure catio or supervised outdoor access is ideal, as this breed is curious and may wander. It gets along well with children and other pets, including cat-friendly dogs, if properly introduced. However, it prefers to be the dominant pet and may assert itself. Provide plenty of toys, scratching posts, and hiding spots. This breed is social and dislikes being left alone for long periods; consider a companion pet if you're away often. Keep windows and balconies secure to prevent falls.
livingTips.zh: 土耳其安哥拉猫能很好适应公寓生活，前提是提供垂直空间如猫树、搁板和窗台供其攀爬和观察。它喜欢互动游戏，需要每日运动以防无聊。安全的猫笼或有监督的户外活动是理想选择，因为该品种好奇且可能游荡。如果适当介绍，它能与孩子和其他宠物（包括对猫友好的狗）相处融洽。然而，它更喜欢成为主导宠物，可能会展示支配性。提供大量玩具、抓柱和藏身处。该品种善于社交，不喜欢长时间独处；如果您经常外出，考虑养另一只宠物作伴。确保窗户和阳台安全以防坠落。
